task_description: Phase 1 secure backend: authentication (Argon2id + server-side sessions + TOTP MFA), RBAC middleware, Case CRUD with tenant isolation, integration tests with real Postgres, and CI update.

verification.summary: All 26 tests pass (10 auth + 11 cases + 5 health). Build (prisma generate + tsc) passes cleanly. Security fixes applied: cross-tenant projectId validation in POST /cases, register error handling for P2002/generic errors, and new test for cross-tenant case creation block.
